description.value: The creature's soul has been bound to a powerful entity, typically the Emperor of Mankind. Soul-bound psykers have undergone the ritual of Soul Binding and gain resistance to daemonic possession and Warp predation. They gain a +20 bonus to resist Possession and +10 to resist Psychic Phenomena, but are permanently blinded as a result of the ritual.

system.benefit: The creature's soul is bound, granting +20 to resist Possession and +10 to resist Psychic Phenomena. Permanently blinded from the ritual.
